introSection: Montaña Rusa was a wooden roller coaster located at La Feria Chapultepec Magico in Mexico City, Mexico.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On 22 April 2017 American Coaster Enthusiasts awarded the ride ACE Roller Coaster Landmark status.

After the park closed on 28 September 2019, the ride was demolished in 2022. A large curve of the ride was rebuilt in steel as a homage to the defunct ride and is now a thematic sculpture at the Aztlán Parque Urbano park that replaced La Feria Chapultepec Magico.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Montaña Rusa on Theme Park Review

fullText:
Montaña Rusa was a wooden roller coaster located at La Feria Chapultepec Magico in Mexico City, Mexico.

On 22 April 2017 American Coaster Enthusiasts awarded the ride ACE Roller Coaster Landmark status.

After the park closed on 28 September 2019, the ride was demolished in 2022. A large curve of the ride was rebuilt in steel as a homage to the defunct ride and is now a thematic sculpture at the Aztlán Parque Urbano park that replaced La Feria Chapultepec Magico.


 * Montaña Rusa on Theme Park Review
